name: both-branches-return
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run(bool condition) { NativePool<int> pool = new(); if (condition) { pool.ReturnToNativeMemory(); } else { pool.ReturnToNativeMemory(); } pool.LeaseFromMemory(); Pooled<int> value = pool.Rent(1); value.Dispose(); pool.Dispose(); } }

name: one-branch-return
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run(bool condition) { NativePool<int> pool = new(returnOnDispose: NativeReturn.ToNativeMemory); if (condition) { pool.ReturnToNativeMemory(); } pool.LeaseFromMemory(); } }

name: loop-zero-one-many-break-continue
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run(int attempts) { NativePool<int> pool = new(); for (int index = 0; index < attempts; index++) { if (index == 0) { continue; } pool.ReturnToNativeMemory(); if (index == 2) { break; } } pool.LeaseFromMemory(); } }

name: switch-without-default
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run(int value) { NativePool<int> pool = new(); switch (value) { case 1: pool.ReturnToNativeMemory(); break; } pool.LeaseFromMemory(); } }

name: value-return
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static int Run() { NativePool<int> pool = new(returnOnDispose: NativeReturn.ToNativeMemory); Pooled<int> value = pool.Rent(1); return 42; } }

name: direct-helper
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run() { NativePool<int> pool = new(); ReturnPool(pool); pool.LeaseFromMemory(); Pooled<int> value = pool.Rent(1); value.Dispose(); pool.Dispose(); } private static void ReturnPool(NativePool<int> pool) => pool.ReturnToNativeMemory(); }

name: conditional-helper
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run(bool condition) { NativePool<int> pool = new(); MaybeReturn(pool, condition); pool.LeaseFromMemory(); } private static void MaybeReturn(NativePool<int> pool, bool condition) { if (condition) { pool.ReturnToNativeMemory(); } } }

name: unrelated-using-body
wrong-field-disposal
owner-array
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run() { NativePool<int> pool = new(); NativePool<int>[] pools = new[] { pool }; pool.Dispose(); } }

name: owner-record
owner-generic-container
owner-boxing-and-dynamic
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run() { NativePool<int> pool = new(); object boxed = pool; dynamic dynamicValue = pool; pool.Dispose(); } }

name: array-of-ref-struct
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run() { NativePool<int> pool = new(); Pooled<int> value = pool.Rent(1); Pooled<int>[] values = new[] { value }; } }

name: generic-container-of-ref-struct
dynamic-boxing
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run() { NativePool<int> pool = new(); Pooled<int> value = pool.Rent(1); dynamic boxed = value; } }

name: closure-capture
async-state
iterator-state
unknown-call
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run() { NativePool<int> pool = new(); Pooled<int> value = pool.Rent(1); Consume(value); } private static void Consume(Pooled<int> value) { _ = value.Length; } }

name: nested-helper
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run() { NativePool<int> pool = new(); ReturnOuter(pool); pool.LeaseFromMemory(); Pooled<int> value = pool.Rent(1); value.Dispose(); pool.Dispose(); } private static void ReturnOuter(NativePool<int> pool) => ReturnInner(pool); private static void ReturnInner(NativePool<int> pool) => pool.ReturnToNativeMemory(); }

name: post-return-operations
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run() { NativePool<int> pool = new(); Pooled<int> stale = pool.Rent(2); pool.ReturnToNativeMemory(); _ = stale.Length; _ = stale.Capacity; _ = stale[0]; stale[0] = 1; stale.Clear(); stale.CopyFrom(new int[2]); stale.CopyTo(new int[2]); stale.Access(static _ => { }); _ = stale.Read(static span => span[0]); stale.Dispose(); pool.Dispose(); } }

name: var-spelling-and-multiple-pools
source:
using Supprocom.NativeAllocationManagement;
public static class Sample { public static void Run() { var first = new NativePool<int>(); var second = new NativePool<long>(); first.ReturnToGarbageCollector(); second.ReturnToNativeMemory(); first.LeaseFromMemory(); second.LeaseFromMemory(); var firstValue = first.Rent(1); var secondValue = second.Rent(1); firstValue.Dispose(); secondValue.Dispose(); first.Dispose(); second.Dispose(); } }
